name: VALUE LINE INC
business: Value Line produces investment periodicals and underlying research, and licenses its proprietary ranks and trademarks to third parties for use in investment products. The company's flagship product is The Value Line Investment Survey, and it offers various publications and digital services. It also has a non-voting interest in EULAV Asset Management Trust (EAM) which manages the Value Line Funds.
sellsTo: Institutions including municipal and university libraries
